Atlas: Explores editable travel itinerary generation instead of fixed trip templates.
Focuses on budgets, booked anchors, calendar export, and day-plan structure.
Compass: Treats the job search like an operating system rather than a to-do list.
Combines resume intelligence, search workflows, and AI-assisted triage.
